cases.text: Two plus two equals four.
The factorial of 0 is 1.
2 is greater than 11.
If x is greater than 10, then x is greater than 20.
There exists x such that x is greater than zero.
The API design feels intuitive.
Adding four and five yields ten.
Subtracting five from twelve gives eight.
If x exceeds five, then x exceeds three.
There is an x greater than zero.
Any n is equal to itself.
